name: azure-lean-stack
description: Azure Lean Stack — Claude Code skills for building Azure web apps that cost nothing when nobody's using them and scale up cleanly when they do. 14 composable skills, 37+ documented gotchas, branch-per-environment CI/CD. Every pattern proven in a real production project. Complementary to Microsoft's azure-skills plugin.
tagline: Azure apps that cost nothing when nobody's using them.
